base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of namco_logo_label — a ui (logo) from 1980 pac man. 'NAMCO' wordmark rendered in multiple palette colors (visible in red/yellow/white on sheet). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 'NAMCO' wordmark rendered in multiple palette colors (visible in red/yellow/white on sheet); used in attract-mode copyright line
